mapper.select: select invite_code inviteCode,di.domain_addr domainAddr,ai.site_code siteCode, ai.fb_pix_id FbPixId, ai.fb_token FbToken, ai.google_pix_id GooglePixId, ai.google_token GoogleToken from agent_info ai left join domain_info di on ai.site_code = di.site_code where FIND_IN_SET(#{shortUrl},short_url) > 0 and di.domain_type = #{domainType} and di.bind = #{bind} order by di.updated_time desc limit 0,1
